dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: YOU DUNCE! HEY? WHY WERE YOU HITTING MY DANIEL?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: OH GOD! YOU'VE GOT A MARK!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: MA'AM, WE WERE JUST PLAYING A GAME.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: YOU CALL SLAPPING SOMEONE A GAME?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: SHALL WE PUT THIS ON FACEBOOK?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: LET'S GO SEE THE HOMEROOM TEACHER!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: HOW COULD YOU DO THAT TO DANIEL?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I SAID SOME AWFUL THINGS TO MY ONE AND ONLY MOM.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I AM THE WORLD'S BIGGEST PIECE OF TRASH.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: LIGHTS ARE ON; I CAN'T GO IN.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE BILLS ARE PILED UP AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MOM SAVED UP FOR THESE GLASSES.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I'LL JUST SLIP INTO MY ROOM AND EAT A SNACK.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: I HAVEN'T TAKEN GOOD ENOUGH CARE OF YOU.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: I CAN'T COME WITH YOU BECAUSE OF WORK.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: BUT YOU'LL BE OKAY BY YOURSELF, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: STUDYING, and who cares about friends, right?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: SHE KNEW! SHE KNEW ALL ALONG, BUT SHE PRETENDED NOT TO.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL'S MOM
dialogue.line: I'LL TAKE CARE OF YOUR EXPENSES, JUST TRUST ME AND GO.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: ALL OF MY MIXED EMOTIONS TANGLED UP.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: AND THE TEARS CAME POURING OUT.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I HATED THAT I WAS RUNNING AWAY AND IGNORING MY MOM'S BURDEN.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: MOM, REALLY, YOU DON'T HAVE TO FOLLOW ME. YOU ALREADY CLEANED THE PLACE.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: I'LL EAT WELL AND STUDY HARD.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: YEP, I CAN REALLY GO ALONE; I'M GOING~ THANKS.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: YEAH, MOM, I'M GETTING ON NOW.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BUT ANYWHERE IS BETTER THAN HERE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I'LL MAKE LOTS OF FRIENDS THIS TIME.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I CHOSE TO RUN AWAY LIKE THIS INSTEAD OF FIGHT.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I DON'T MIND MOUNTAINOUS NEIGHBORHOODS! SO THIS IS IT!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I DON'T MIND AN OLD SHACK!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: HELLO, NEIGHBOR LADY! HELLO, MAKE LOVE ALL DAY!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE UPHILL IS TASTEFUL. NO ONE KNOWS ME HERE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I DON'T HAVE TO FEAR TOMORROW ANY MORE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: LIKE A LARVA THAT WAITS SEVEN YEARS TO BE BORN AS A CICADA.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IT'S MY TURN TO BE THAT CICADA.

dialogue.speaker: BARBER
dialogue.line: WELCOME! YOU'VE COME FOR A CUT?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: THE DARKEST SEAT IN THE CORNER. AH, IT'S A GREAT SPOT. SATISFIED.

dialogue.speaker: BARBER
dialogue.line: SHALL WE DO THE 'TWO BLOCK' STYLE?

dialogue.speaker: BARBER
dialogue.line: THE SIDES AND LOWER BACK OF THE HAIR IS SHAVED. LOTS OF CELEBRITIES HAVE IT.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: UH, SURE. OKAY, LET'S GO WITH THAT.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: HE SEEMS TO HAVE A LONG STORY. CELEBRITIES? Keke.

dialogue.speaker: BARBER
dialogue.line: OKAY, I'M GONNA DO MY BEST!

dialogue.speaker: BARBER
dialogue.line: SIR, WHY DON'T YOU TAKE OFF YOUR GLASSES? MY EYES AREN'T SO GOOD. YOU HAVE GREAT EYES, YOU SHOULD WEAR CONTACT LENSES. ALL DONE.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: WOW... HOLY... EVERYTHING'S FUZZY WITHOUT. IS THIS REALLY ME?

dialogue.speaker: BARBER
dialogue.line: I DID MY BEST; I HOPE YOU LIKE IT.

dialogue.speaker: BARBER
dialogue.line: YOU MIGHT FEEL AWKWARD AT FIRST.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: AWESOME! FIRST TIME I'VE FELT THIS! THEIR EYES ON ME! MOM, NORTH KOREA- HUSH! THRILLING! HOO HOO! STOP TALKING ABOUT ME!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: DO I REALLY LOOK THAT DIFFERENT? I LOOK A LITTLE TOUGHER.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WANNA FIGHT WITH ME? YOU WANNA DIE?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: WOW, I LOOK LIKE I CAN FIGHT.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY PUNK, YOU KNOW WHO I AM? COME HERE.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: DID SHE SEE EVERYTHING? DON'T BE SCARED, I'M A CICADA NOW. JUST LET IT GO LIKE A MAN, THIS IS NOTHING.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: WHO'S THIS GUY? YOU KNOW HIM?

dialogue.speaker: MIRA
dialogue.line: IT'S NOTHING. NOT THIS TIME AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: NOTHING?! LET ME GO FOR A SEC.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: FINE, YOU ARE DAMN LUCKY TODAY, PAL. DON'T BE LIKE THAT IN PUBLIC.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: AH, I SURVIVED. SYMPATHY ALWAYS COMES FROM GIRLS IN THIS LIFE.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: HOLD ON! BUT I'M A NEW MAN!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: YEAH! SHE SMILED AT ME! SHE WAS INTERESTED IN ME!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: HE WAS JUST PRETENDING TO BE TOUGH IN FRONT OF HER! IF I JUST STEP BACK NOW, I CAN'T CHANGE ONE BIT!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: LET'S TRY AND CLEAR UP THE MISUNDERSTANDING, SHALL WE?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: LOOKING COOL! HOW ABOUT THE THREE OF US GRAB SOME COFFEE?

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: I TOLD YOU NOT TO SHOW YOURSELF AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HUH? HUH? OH MY GOD! CALL THE POLICE! TAKE THIS!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I WAS MORE WORRIED ABOUT THE SOUND OF PHONES RECORDING.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: FEATURED CONTENT: CAUGHT THIS PIG IN THE HONGDAE AREA. WHO HAS A FRIEND LIKE THIS?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HAHA! WHAT? WHACK! AWESOME! YOU SHOULDN'T WE HELP HIM? FILMING?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: SO I'M A FACEBOOK STAR NOW.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: I AM A WASTE OF SPACE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: ALL OF MY CONFIDENCE AND DETERMINATION THAT I TRIED SO HARD TO GET... I'M F***ING GARBAGE! I'M SCREWED!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: FEATURED CONTENT: CAUGHT THIS PIG IN THE HONGDAE AREA. WHO HAS A FRIEND LIKE THIS? www.facebook.com/starucc WITH TAEJCON PARK.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NOTHING BUT MOCKERY ON MY PHONE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: WHAT HAD BEEN MY COMFY LITTLE NEST WAS NOW FILLED WITH AN APPALLING LONELINESS.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TO OVERCOME IT, I BEGAN TO SOB ENDLESSLY AND I WAS SO EXHAUSTED FROM BAWLING, I GUESS I FELL ASLEEP.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: AH, I GUESS I NODDED OFF.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: BATHROOM, BATHROOM~~ WAS I WEARING CONTACTS?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: AFTER A BIT OF SLEEP, I FEEL LIGHTER.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: WAS THE CEILING ALWAYS THIS LOW?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: I GUESS I'M NOT USED TO IT HERE.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: MAYBE MY EYES ARE SWOLLEN FROM CRYING?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: GOTTA WASH MY HANDS. HOW SWOLLEN ARE THEY?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MY EYES WERE NOT AS SWOLLEN AS I THOUGHT. THEY SEEMED PERFECTLY FINE. SO HOW SHOULD I EXPLAIN THIS?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THIS MAN WHO WAS PERFECT EVERYWHERE!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I WAS SO SHOCKED I COULDN'T MAKE A SOUND.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IT WAS LIKE SOMEONE PRESSED PAUSE.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL
dialogue.line: WHAT IS THIS? A DREAM? BUT IT HURTS. MY BODY?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: CONFUSION AND DOUBT POURED OUT SUDDENLY.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: WHILE DEALING WITH THE PANIC ALONE, I SAW SOMETHING EVEN MORE SHOCKING.

summary: Daniel's mom intervenes when he's being bullied, embarrassing him further. Feeling like a burden, Daniel decides to run away to a vocational school to start fresh. After getting a new haircut, he feels confident but quickly gets into another confrontation with a bully named Zack, which ends with him being humiliated on social media. Later, Daniel wakes up to find himself in a new, perfect body, only to discover his original body is still sleeping beside him.
